prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar XK inline-6 (engine code: XK6 3.8L) with a forged crankshaft from Mahle Motorsport, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged pistons for high-compression reliability. Pair with a custom 3x Weber 45DCOE carburetor setup tuned by Fuel Injection Developments (FID) for precise fuel delivery and a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Hayward & Scott with a MagnaFlow 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a straight-through muffler for optimal flow.

Install a Tremec T56 Magnum 6-speed manual transmission with a twin-disc clutch from Tilton Engineering and a custom bellhousing adapter plate by K transmissions. Pair with a Quaife ATB differential (3.54:1 ratio) for improved power distribution and a custom aluminum driveshaft by G-Force Racing Transmissions to handle increased torque.

Upgrade the braking system with a Wilwood 6-piston front brake kit (13-inch rotors) and a 4-piston rear kit (12-inch rotors) with DOT 4 racing brake fluid from Motul. Install a custom brake bias valve from Balance Bar for adjustable front/rear braking force, and pair with stainless steel braided brake lines from Goodridge for consistent pedal feel.
estetica: Install a custom widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) adapted specifically for the XK150 by a specialist fabricator, featuring hand-rolled fenders, custom aluminum side skirts, and a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards. Pair with a custom rear diffuser by APR Performance and a carbon fiber rear spoiler by Seibon Carbon for aerodynamic balance.

Replace the stock bumpers with lightweight aluminum replicas by Jaguar Classic Parts, featuring a custom mesh grille by Custom Grilles UK with a polished aluminum finish. Install LED headlights by Hella (H7 bulbs) with a custom C-shaped DRL setup by LUX Automotive, and pair with a set of 17-inch wire-spoke wheels by Borrani (model: 6055) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/45/17 front, 245/40/17 rear).

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter) with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations. Install Recaro SPG XL seats with custom mounting brackets by Corbeau, and pair with a custom aluminum shift knob by B&M Racing (short throw) and a custom aluminum pedal set by Sparco. Add a digital dash by AIM Solo 2 DL for real-time performance data.
